page: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-48xl is a general-purpose bare metal server instance powered by Intel processors. It features an x86_64 architecture with 192 virtual CPUs mapped to 96 physical cores, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz with dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage such as Amazon Elastic Block Store. To support high-throughput storage and networking demands, the instance is network and EBS optimized, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. It does not feature any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the bare metal deployment model provides direct access to physical hardware, eliminating virtualization overhead for resource-intensive workloads. The high density of dedicated CPU cores and substantial memory capacity make this instance suitable for large-scale enterprise applications, high-performance web serving, containerized microservices, and database workloads that rely heavily on network-attached storage.
description: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-48xl is a general-purpose bare metal server featuring 192 vCPUs across 96 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 768.0 GB of dedicated system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU ratio. This instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, but compensates with a high baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. It is optimized for network and EBS performance, making it highly suitable for workloads requiring direct hardware access without virtualization overhead. The server is designed for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and database deployments that demand high network throughput and substantial compute density.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-48xl is a general-purpose bare metal server featuring 192 Intel vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-bandwidth bare metal instance featuring dedicated Intel processors and balanced memory for demanding enterprise and network-optimized workloads.

768.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
